regions.text: Great cities have theaters for plays, music buildings for great works, and libraries for the best that has been thought and written.
Art, music, and poetry come from man’s greatest hours with himself and give others their greatest hours.
theater: building for plays. acted: when a play is given. library: building for keeping books.
poetry: words put together in the best way for others to feel. FUTURE: will act. PRESENT: act(s). PAST: acted.
